title: Update contact information with new mobile number and email

requirements.summary: Update footer contact information to display mobile number '9345285169' and email 'arnutssnacks@gmail.com'
acceptanceCriteria: Footer component displays '9345285169' as the contact phone number
Footer component displays 'arnutssnacks@gmail.com' as the contact email
Phone number is properly formatted and clickable if applicable

file_operations.description: Update the contact information section to display the new mobile number '9345285169' and email 'arnutssnacks@gmail.com'. Ensure the email link uses 'mailto:arnutssnacks@gmail.com' and the phone number is properly formatted with appropriate link (tel:) if currently implemented as clickable.

requirements.summary: Update WhatsApp order button to use phone number '9345285169' for WhatsApp integration
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp button generates correct WhatsApp URL with phone number 9345285169
WhatsApp link opens chat with the updated number when clicked
Pre-filled cart message format remains intact

file_operations.description: Update the WhatsApp URL generation to use phone number '9345285169' instead of the current number. Ensure the WhatsApp link format (wa.me/919345285169 or api.whatsapp.com) is correct and the pre-filled message with cart items and total amount continues to work as expected.
